archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Flat Utility (Soft Neo-Brutalism)

headings.rules: Use for all headlines, section titles, and modal headers. Use font-semibold to font-extrabold. tracking-tight.

body.rules: Clear legibility for dense dashboard tables and text.

mono.rules: CRITICAL: Use for pipeline stages, tags, AI matching scores, scheduler times, and logs.

primary.usage: Dashboard navigation, primary buttons, major CTAs, active states.

secondary.usage: AI scoring, Sonnet processing steps, automation steps.

output.usage: Outputs, logged data, inserted rows, success states.

input.usage: Data sources, scraping triggers, raw JDs.

note.usage: Optional steps, follow-ups, LinkedIn notes, campaign trackers.

design_system.borders: 1.5px solid borders strictly enforced on all UI components. Use the exact 20% darker shades defined in the palette. For white surfaces/cards, use border-[#E0E0E0] or a primary palette border.
design_system.border_radius: 8px (rounded-lg) EXACTLY. Do not use full pills (rounded-full) or sharp corners.
design_system.shadows: NONE. No drop shadows anywhere. Do not use shadow-sm or shadow-lg classes. Use flat colored backgrounds and borders to create hierarchy.
design_system.hover_states: Hover states should NOT use shadows. Instead, use a slight translation (-translate-y-0.5) and darken the background color slightly by applying black with 5% opacity, or just change the fill.

layout_spacing.bento_grid: Use tight bento grids (gap-4 to gap-6). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for dashboard overviews.
layout_spacing.containers: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) inside bordered cards to avoid text-border collision.
layout_spacing.pipeline_visualization: Use horizontal scrollable bento-style lanes or timelines to represent stages. Map colors directly to the stage: Input (yellow) -> AI (gray/blue) -> DB Output (green).

component_instructions.buttons: Flat background, border-[1.5px] matching the darker shade of the button color, 8px radius. Text must be bold (Sora). NO SHADOWS.
component_instructions.cards: Override Shadcn Card component classes: `rounded-lg border-[1.5px] shadow-none bg-white`. Never use default shadows.
component_instructions.badges: Use JetBrains Mono. Flat background with matching 1.5px border. Example: `bg-[#c5dca0] border-[#9db080] border-[1.5px]`.
component_instructions.tables: Row borders only on the bottom, flush layout. No outer container shadow. Header font should be JetBrains Mono.
component_instructions.data_test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., `data-testid="scrape-jobs-btn"`, `data-testid="pipeline-stage-card"`).

image_urls.description: Professional profile avatar for the logged-in user in the dashboard header.

icons.usage: Use crisp, consistent sizing (size={18} or size={20}). Do not mix libraries.

instructions_to_main_agent: COMPLETELY REMOVE SHADOWS from Shadcn defaults. This is an absolute explicit requirement from the user.
Enforce 1.5px borders exactly everywhere. Use arbitrary values in Tailwind like `border-[1.5px]`.
Pipeline nodes must be visually color-coded according to the provided palette: Inputs (#f5f2b8), AI/Scoring (#818aa3), Outputs/DB (#c5dca0), Actions/Primary (#a491d3), Follow-ups (#f9dad0).
Apply fonts globally in index.css or via Tailwind config. 'Sora' for headings, 'DM Sans' for body, 'JetBrains Mono' for data points and code blocks.
Do not use gradients. Solid pastel blocks with dark, crisp borders only.
Ensure `data-testid` attributes are included on all interactive elements as requested for testing.
Ensure that JS files are written rather than TSX.
